task_context.actionable_question: Where do I stand compared to my class?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Show student's standing (top X%). Explain which metrics are above/below average.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: You are performing exceptionally well compared to your cohort. Your average score, score percentile, and engagement percentile are all significantly higher than the cohort benchmark, indicating strong academic performance and engagement.

Insights: Outstanding Average Score: Your average score of 94.34 is well above the cohort benchmark of 66.68, showcasing your strong academic abilities. | High Score Percentile: With a score percentile of 89.8, you are in the top 10% of your class, while the cohort benchmark is at 50, indicating you are performing significantly better than average. | Strong Engagement: Your engagement percentile of 75 is also above the cohort benchmark of 50, suggesting that you are actively participating and involved in your studies.

Educational implications: Your high performance indicates effective study habits and engagement strategies.

Recommendations: medium - Continue to challenge yourself with advanced materials or projects. - This will help you maintain your high performance and further develop your skills.
